hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); os.makedirs(".slopp",exist_ok=True); json.dump({"session-id": d.get("session_id",""), "prompt": d.get("prompt","")}, open(".slopp/pending-intent","w"))' 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c 'import json,sys,os,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); sid=d.get("session_id",""); os.path.exists(".slopp/store.db") and subprocess.run([os.environ.get("CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT","")+"/bin/slopp","--call","checkpoint",json.dumps({"agent": sid, "label": "session pause"})], capture_output=True, timeout=280)' 2>/dev/null || true
